summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx and frontend/src/pages/About.tsx as required by REQ-6 and REQ-7. However, two additional files were also modified: frontend-file-summaries.txt and project_state.json. The constraint states only Home.tsx and About.tsx may be modified, so these additional file changes are hallucinated features. The core requirements appear to be addressed in terms of restoring the two pages.

hallucinated_features.description: Modification of frontend-file-summaries.txt, which was not requested and violates the constraint that only Home.tsx and About.tsx may be modified.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Only Home.tsx and About.tsx may be modified — all other files must remain untouched.' frontend-file-summaries.txt was modified without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Modification of project_state.json, which was not requested and violates the constraint that only Home.tsx and About.tsx may be modified.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Only Home.tsx and About.tsx may be modified — all other files must remain untouched.' project_state.json was modified without being requested.
